title: Tryg - Transactions in connection with share buyback programme
description: On 22 January 2026, Tryg A/S (“Tryg”) announced that the Board of Directors had decided to initiate a share buyback programme of up to DKK 1.0 billion. The share buyback programme is executed in accordance with EU Market Abuse Regulation, EU Regulation no. 596/2014 of 16 April 2014 and the provisions of Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 of 8 March 2016 (the “Safe Harbour Regulation”). The share buyback programme will end no later than 13 May 2026.

title: Major Shareholder Announcement

HOPSCOTCH GROUPE : Droits de vote et actions - Mars 2026

title: Ekstraordinære indfrielser (CK 93)
description:
I medfør af kapitalmarkedsloven § 24, oplyser DLR Kredit hermed om ekstraordinære indfrielser pr. fredag den 07 april 2026.
 
Oplysningerne fremgår af vedhæftede fil.

Denne meddelelse er offentliggjort med henblik på opfyldelse af transparensdirektivets krav om offentliggørelse. Oplysningerne vil endvidere på sædvanlig måde blive formidlet via Nasdaq Copenhagen.
Spørgsmål kan rettes til: Head of Rating & IR Jakob Kongsgaard Olsson tlf. nr. 33 42 07 06.

title: Ydelsesrækker (CK94)
description:
I medfør af kapitalmarkedsloven § 24, oplyser DLR Kredit A/S hermed om ydelsesrækker (CK94) pr. 13 april 2026.　
Oplysningerne fremgår af vedhæftede fil.

title: Síminn hf. – Útboð á víxlum miðvikudaginn 15. apríl 2026
description: Síminn hf. efnir til útboðs á víxlum miðvikudaginn 15. apríl 2026. Boðnir verða til sölu víxlar í flokknum SIMINN261022, undir kr. 9.000.000.000 útgáfuramma félagsins.

title: REITIR: Framkvæmd endurkaupaáætlunar í viku 15
description: Stjórn Reita hf. samþykkti nýja endurkaupaáætlun félagsins þann 8. apríl 2026 sbr. tilkynningu í Kauphöll þann dag. Var henni hrint í framkvæmd þann 9. apríl 2026. Endurkaupaáætlunin er framkvæmd í samræmi við ákvæði hlutafélagalaga nr. 2/1995, 5. gr. reglugerðar Evrópuþingsins og ráðsins (ESB) um markaðssvik nr. 596/2014, sem og framselda reglugerð framkvæmdastjórnarinnar 2016/1052, samanber lög um aðgerðir gegn markaðssvikum nr. 60/2021.

title: Over a third of Americans would accept twice as many ads for cheaper streaming
description:
New Bango data shows viewers are open to more ads if it means lower subscription costs

title: FTI Consulting Appoints Benedict Brogan to Strategic Communications Segment
description: LONDON, April 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- FTI Consulting, Inc. (NYSE: FCN) today announced the appointment of Benedict Brogan as a Senior Managing Director within the firm’s Strategic Communications segment.
